title: Question: Multiple comma-separated declaration in one for-loop
body:
---


Author Name: **Yu Sheng Lin** (@johnjohnlin)
Original Redmine Message: 2692 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hello.

In the SystemVerilog standard,
there can be multiple comma-separated in one for-loop declaration like this.

```
for (int count = 0, done = 0, j = 0; j * count < 125; j++, count++)
     $display("Value j = %d\n", j );

```

However, it is not supported by Verilator, at least in 4.004.
Is there any plan about supporting this now?
Or, can someone provide some instructions about how to write a patch to support this.
code_blocks:
for (int count = 0, done = 0, j = 0; j * count < 125; j++, count++)
     $display("Value j = %d\n", j );
